name: registry_set_exploit_guard_susp_allowed_apps

values: software\\microsoft\\windows defender\\windows defender exploit guard\\controlled folder access\\allowedapplications
raw_values: *SOFTWARE\\Microsoft\\Windows Defender\\Windows Defender Exploit Guard\\Controlled Folder Access\\AllowedApplications*

raw_query: any where registry.path:"*SOFTWARE\\Microsoft\\Windows Defender\\Windows Defender Exploit Guard\\Controlled Folder Access\\AllowedApplications*" and (registry.path like~ ("*\\Users\\Public\\*", "*\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\*", "*\\Desktop\\*", "*\\PerfLogs\\*", "*\\Windows\\Temp\\*"))
